```spthy
theory QUIC_ClientHello
begin

builtins: diffie-hellman, hashing, symmetric-encryption

functions:
    HKDF/2,
    KeyExp/0,
    client_label/0,
    server_label/0

// ClientSetup: derives initial and handshake keys, sends ClientHello and ACKs.
// Performs DH with server's key from ServerHello, verifies and transitions to 1-RTT.
// Emits ClientInitialKeysGenerated to mark initial key derivation.
let ClientSetup =
    new sKc;
    let pKc = 'g'^sKc in
    new DCID;
    let initial_secret = HKDF(DCID, 'quic_v1_initial_salt') in
    let client_initial_key = HKDF(initial_secret, client_label) in
    let server_initial_key = HKDF(initial_secret, server_label) in
    event ClientInitialKeysGenerated(pKc, DCID, client_initial_key, server_initial_key);
    let ClientHello = senc(<pKc, DCID>, client_initial_key) in
    out(<DCID, ClientHello>)
    in(ServerHello);
    let <pKs, =DCID> = sdec(ServerHello, server_initial_key) in
    let TLS_shared_secret = pKs^sKc in
    let handshake_secret = HKDF(TLS_shared_secret, h(<ClientHello, ServerHello>)) in
    let client_handshake_key = HKDF(handshake_secret, client_label) in
    let server_handshake_key = HKDF(handshake_secret, server_label) in
    let client_initial_ack = senc('initial_ack', client_handshake_key) in
    let client_handshake_ack = senc('handshake_ack', client_handshake_key) in
    out(client_initial_ack)
    out(client_handshake_ack)
    in(server_handshake_finished_msg);
    let <certificate_verify, server_handshake_finished> = sdec(server_handshake_finished_msg, server_handshake_key) in
    let client_1rtt_key = HKDF(TLS_shared_secret, h(<ClientHello, ServerHello, server_handshake_key, server_handshake_finished>)) in
    let client_handshake_confirmation = senc('handshake_confirmed', client_1rtt_key) in
    out(client_handshake_confirmation)
    let data_ack = senc('data_ack', client_1rtt_key) in
    out(data_ack)

// ServerSetup: mirrors client, derives initial and handshake keys, sends ServerHello.
// Sends server_handshake_finished_msg and confirmation, derives 1-RTT keys.
// Binds DCID and pKc via decryption before use.
let ServerSetup =
    new sKs;
    let pKs = 'g'^sKs in
    in(<DCID, ClientHello>);
    let initial_secret = HKDF(DCID, 'quic_v1_initial_salt') in
    let client_initial_key = HKDF(initial_secret, client_label) in
    let server_initial_key = HKDF(initial_secret, server_label) in
    let <pKc, =DCID> = sdec(ClientHello, client_initial_key) in
    let ServerHello = senc(<pKs, DCID>, server_initial_key) in
    out(ServerHello)
    let TLS_shared_secret = pKc^sKs in
    let handshake_secret = HKDF(TLS_shared_secret, h(<ClientHello, ServerHello>)) in
    let client_handshake_key = HKDF(handshake_secret, client_label) in
    let server_handshake_key = HKDF(handshake_secret, server_label) in
    new certificate_verify;
    new server_handshake_finished;
    let server_1rtt_key = HKDF(TLS_shared_secret, h(<ClientHello, ServerHello, server_handshake_key, server_handshake_finished>)) in
    let client_1rtt_key = HKDF(TLS_shared_secret, h(<ClientHello, ServerHello, server_handshake_key, server_handshake_finished>)) in
    let server_handshake_finished_msg = senc(<certificate_verify, server_handshake_finished>, server_handshake_key) in
    out(server_handshake_finished_msg)
    let server_handshake_confirmation = senc('handshake_confirmed', server_1rtt_key) in
    out(server_handshake_confirmation)

process:
    ! ClientSetup | ! ServerSetup

end
```
